app.title: Onter
app.tagline: Organize today. Protect your family tomorrow.
app.viewSource: Trust & verify: Source code on GitHub

features.localStorage: All your data stays private on your device
features.noServer: No data sent to any server or third party
features.autoDelete: Data is automatically cleared after 24 hours for added privacy
features.noCloud: No cloud storage, no hidden tracking

country.label: Select Your Country
country.description: Choose your country to load appropriate form fields

confirmClear.title: Clear Existing Data?
confirmClear.message: You have previously saved data. Starting fresh will permanently delete all your saved information. This action cannot be undone.

howItWorks.title: How it works:
howItWorks.description: Your information stays on your device—never on our servers. No third-party access, no hidden tracking, and automatic data cleanup after 24 hours for added security.

errors.selectFile: Please select a file to import
errors.templateFailed: Failed to generate template. Please try again.

formStepper.loadingDescription: Please wait while we load the form for {{country}}

success.title: Success!
success.message: Data exported successfully! All data has been cleared from your browser.

warning.title: Important: Data Will Be Cleared
warning.message: After exporting, all your data will be automatically deleted from the browser for security. Make sure to save the downloaded Excel file in a secure location.

error.title: Export Failed
error.defaultMessage: Failed to export data. Please try again.

validation.title: Validation Errors
validation.message: Please fix the following errors before proceeding:

warning.title: You have entered some data in this section
warning.message: Skipping will move to the next section, but your entered data will be saved and you can return to complete it later.

info.dataSaved: Your data will be saved automatically
info.canReturn: You can return anytime from the sidebar

table.noEntries: No entries yet. Click "Add Row" to get started.
